title: Tanker Fleet Heads to Load U.S. Oil as Middle East Supply Crumbles
summary: Empty supertankers have left Asia en route to the U.S. via the Cape of Good Hope in one of the biggest queue of vessels ever seen at sea, as Asian buyers rush to load U.S. crude to replace part of the supply lost in the Middle East. title: If a violent downturn strikes the market, new ETF strategies may be vulnerable. Here's why
summary: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.

title: China’s Nuclear Power Boom Is Accelerating Faster Than Expected
summary: China plans to put into operation seven new nuclear reactors this year, boosting its already substantial fleet of nuclear generators, which is already the largest in the world.
